description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single 'hygiene' stage and multiple jobs all extending the shared .run template. Add a gitlab-com-csmerm:missing_attributes job that runs in the hygiene stage with a parallel matrix of four TRIAGE_SOURCE_PATH/TYPE pairs, sets TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to policies/groups/gitlab-com/csmerm/missing_triage_attributes.yml, and executes only when $TRIAGE_MISSING_ATTRIBUTES is true. Add separate jobs gitlab-com-support-forum:auto-closure, gitlab-foss:migrate-issues-to-gitlab, gitlab-org:adjust-health-status, gitlab-org:label-interlocked-epics, master-broken-incident:root-cause-label-hygiene, master-broken-incident:status-hygiene, security-gitlab:security-process-checks, and www-gitlab-com:website-label-community-contributions, each running in the hygiene stage, setting their own TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE variable to the appropriate policy YAML path, and triggering only when their respective $TRIAGE_... variable is true. All jobs inherit the script defined in .run and share any global image, services, caches, or variables defined elsewhere in the pipeline.
